name: Biome1_Island
comment: v8 (2026-06-12, smoothness rework, slots UNCHANGED from v7): terrain between arenas rebuilt - the serpentine is now a graded ROAD ribbon (<=26.6 deg by construction, cut+fill), G1/G2 pads hug the rotated arena footprints at the arena GROUND-PLATE level (A7 outer_ground -500 exposed again), G3 = exact local-frame bowl under A5 terraces with an exit bench behind bort_s to the citadel-stairs landing (player path: enter SW approach, fight down, antenna, hop bort_s, bench road to the stairs). Route legs and contact heights are DERIVED from slots + arena specs + citadel_stairs (route_corridor verts = author gesture: [shoulder, G1, G2, G3, landing]). make_biome1_heightmap.py --seed N varies ONLY nature layers (pillars pinned). [v7: author round 5 SERPENTINE, citadel-distances ~0.73/0.53/0.34 D] [slots synced from editor]

landscape.extent_note: 201600x201600 centered on origin; create at location (-100800,-100800,-2000)

island.cliff_note: gentle shield dome rising toward the EAST cape (the citadel); the ONLY cliff is the cape's seaward face, everywhere else - beaches

slots.note: toss ORIGIN over water on the M1->CITADEL axis (author 2026-06-11: the poster shot - pier ahead, citadel towering behind it); RunLaunchPoint is author-placed
ON the start->citadel axis; player lands here from the sea toss
lighthouse = early-spiral landmark; chain heads WEST (CCW in UE view)
spiral passes under the citadel cape - permanent landmark showcase
landing on the NW rim - the LOW far end (~20 m beach terrace): the whole climb 19->90->160 m lies ahead, across the island to the east citadel cape
first switchback, SW side (~0.73 D from citadel); route comes along the south-west beaches from the landing
middle switchback at the island center (~0.53 D)
last switchback (~0.34 D); A5 bowl cuts into the final upslope
ON THE LIP of the EAST cape (160 m), far end from the landing; the serpentine flanks around and enters from the EAST side; gate 3/3, permanent field

rules.maldive_model: AUTHOR SPEC 2026-06-11: each maldive = a micro-island barely bigger than its arena (flat top = arena bounding circle + ~900 uu rim, ~35 deg beach slope), arena DEAD-CENTER, open water between islands MANDATORY. Slope-guard arenas (ring around the citadel) are the only ones on the big island.
rules.guard_ring: SERPENTINE (author drawing #2): arenas on the switchback turns of an S-route, climb 22->54->89->160 m; citadel approached from its EAST flank; route slopes <= 30 deg
rules.budget_note: start->M1 is the BALLISTIC TOSS (~7000 uu), not a valve; maldive hops ~16-18k path per the author's trajectory
rules.terrain_note: GENTLE everywhere (author: 'полого везде, пляж вместо обрыва'): wide beach aprons, soft dome toward the cape, subtle pads (wide blends, NO raised rims), no empty pad discs

citadel_stairs.comment: author right-angle staircase inside Lvl_A6_Villa (valve_M4_shoulder2/3 + ant_plat2). Anchors = LOCAL offsets from the citadel slot (pos+yaw), computed from EXACT actor transforms (not AABBs!): lines are the TOP-surface center-lines of each flight. Terrain rule: clearance cap top_z-150 under the flights, landing flattened to lower_tip_top-30; the stairs fit is applied LAST in the generator so nothing re-buries it.

coast_cuts.comment: author cut 1 (2026-06-11): NW lobe west of the cape - coast pulled in, beach transition
author cut 2: the whole east lobe - no empty forest land
